narrative: President Trump warns of massive military action as Gulf War risks drive a broad US Dollar rally — gold lower -2.41%; equities -1.30%; DXY +0.35%; VIX 19.9. USD vs GBP is the dominant G10 theme as USD (+0.806% avg) outpaces the laggard GBP (-0.591% avg) on geopolitical hedging. USD/JPY firms to 163.81 supported by a 275bp Fed-BoJ carry; intervention risk remains elevated as price holds above the SMA200. Watch the BoE rate decision 02:30 UTC tomorrow.
